dict.string: N1 reads your sleep, heart rate, and activity to answer your questions; your raw data never leaves your device.

N1 uses occasional location 'visits' to find patterns like work vs home in your questions. It's optional, stays on your device, and is never uploaded except as aggregated context to your own analysis backend.

N1 uses occasional location 'visits' to find patterns like work vs home in your questions. It's optional, stays on your device, and is never uploaded except as aggregated context to your own analysis backend.
